title: Schiedeella falcata
taxonomy: Schiedeella falcata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Schiedeella, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as orchids, consisting of over 30,000 known species. Schiedeella falcata is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants, often in tropical environments. The species classification of Schiedeella falcata is a key component in understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological role within its native habitat.
